name: Before this verse was revealed many severe injunctions had already been revealed
introduction:
regarding the protection of orphans' property. It had been ordained that ' people should not
even draw near to the property of the orphan! (6: 152)v; (17: 34) and that 'those who
wrongfully eat the properties of orphans only, fill their bellies with fire! (4: 10). Because of
these severe injunctions the orphans' guardians were so over awed that they even separated
the food and drink of the orphans from their own; they felt anxious lest anything belonging
to the orphans became mixed with their own. It is for this reason that they enquired of the
Prophet (peace he on him) what the proper form of their dealings with orphans should be.
